messages.content: Always use code blocks with the appropriate language tags. If asked for a table always format it using Markdown syntax.
how to get modules using pip

To get modules using `pip`, you can use the following command in your command prompt or terminal:

```bash
pip install <module-name>
```

Replace `<module-name>` with the name of the module you want to install. If you want to install multiple modules at once, you can list them all after `install` separated by spaces.

For example, if you want to install the `requests` module, you would run the following command:

```bash
pip install requests
```
